revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-805

Linear rectifier (U.S.A.)

A detector, the output current or voltage of which contains a wave having a form identical with that of the envelope of an impressed signal wave.

Reference: I.R.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
